raw_description:
Featuring 5-star accommodation, Jabal Omar Jumeirah, Makkah is located in Makkah, 250 m from Masjid Al Haram and 10 km from Hira Cave. Featuring a fitness centre, the 5-star hotel has air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, each with a private bathroom. The hotel features family rooms.

All units in the hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV. Each room is equipped with a kettle, while selected rooms include a terrace and others also provide guests with city views. At Jabal Omar Jumeirah, Makkah every room is equipped with bed linen and towels.

Breakfast is available daily, and includes buffet, American and vegetarian options. At the accommodation you will find a restaurant serving Mediterranean, Middle Eastern and Moroccan cuisine. Vegetarian, vegan and gluten-free options can also be requested.

With staff speaking Arabic and English, guidance is available at the reception.

Zamzam Well is 4.1 km from Jabal Omar Jumeirah, Makkah, while Makkah Museum is 4.1 km away. The nearest airport is King Abdulaziz International Airport, 92 km from the hotel.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.9for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Jumeirah Jabal Omar Makkah. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Family rooms, Free WiFi, 3 restaurants.
